speaker: PISANIO
text: Black as the ink that’s on thee! Senseless bauble,

speaker: PISANIO
text: Art thou a fedary for this act, and look’st

speaker: PISANIO

speaker: IMOGEN
text: How now, Pisanio?

speaker: PISANIO
text: Madam, here is a letter from my lord.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Who, thy lord that is my lord, Leonatus?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: O, learned indeed were that astronomer

speaker: IMOGEN
text: That knew the stars as I his characters!

speaker: IMOGEN
text: He’d lay the future open. You good gods,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Let what is here contained relish of love,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Of my lord’s health, of his content (yet not

text: That we two are asunder; let that grieve him.

text: Some griefs are med’cinable; that is one of them,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: For it doth physic love) of his content

speaker: IMOGEN
text: All but in that. Good wax, thy leave.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Blest be

speaker: IMOGEN
text: You bees that make these locks of counsel. Lovers

speaker: IMOGEN
text: And men in dangerous bonds pray not alike;

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Though forfeiters you cast in prison, yet

speaker: IMOGEN
text: You clasp young Cupid’s tables. Good news, gods!

speaker: IMOGEN
text: O, for a horse with wings! Hear’st thou, Pisanio?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: He is at Milford Haven. Read, and tell me

speaker: IMOGEN
text: How far ’tis thither. If one of mean affairs

speaker: IMOGEN

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Glide thither in a day? Then, true Pisanio,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Who long’st like me to see thy lord, who long’st—

speaker: IMOGEN

speaker: IMOGEN

speaker: IMOGEN

text: Tell me how Wales was made so happy as

speaker: PISANIO
text: Madam, ’s enough for you, and too much too.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Why, one that rode to ’s execution, man,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Could never go so slow. I have heard of riding wagers

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Where horses have been nimbler than the sands

speaker: IMOGEN
text: That run i’ th’ clock’s behalf. But this is fool’ry.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Go, bid my woman feign a sickness, say

speaker: IMOGEN

speaker: PISANIO
text: Madam, you’re best consider.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I see before me, man. Nor here, nor here,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Nor what ensues, but have a fog in them

speaker: IMOGEN
text: That I cannot look through. Away, I prithee.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Do as I bid thee. There’s no more to say.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Accessible is none but Milford way.
